notes: Semantic Scholar is an AI-powered research tool. Papers identified by 40-character hex SHA hash. API available.

match_nodes.description: Semantic Scholar paper ID (40-character hex SHA hash)

data.description: Semantic Scholar paper identified by 40-character hexadecimal SHA hash.
data.notes: Semantic Scholar is developed by the Allen Institute for AI (AI2). The API provides citation graphs, abstracts, and AI-generated summaries. Paper IDs are stable SHA hashes derived from paper metadata.
